## Current Behavior

## What You Expected

What result were you expecting instead?

## What You Already Tried

List the commands, settings, or troubleshooting steps you already attempted.

## Logs / Screenshots

Add the smallest relevant logs or screenshots.

Please remove secrets, tokens, and private transcript content before posting.
